name: Oryxmas Ornament: Energized
description: Notes Obtained from the Oryxmas Bonus Program. It’s a component in creating the Ornaments of Unity.
effects: On Taking Damage: 10% chance to spawn an Oryxmas Tree that inflicts Energized to surrounding players for 4 seconds and deals 50 damage to surrounding enemies every 0.2 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds
